prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `3d6c6e23`.
codex_response:
Implemented the new ARC2 task package in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_3d6c6e23/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_3d6c6e23/verifier.py#L4), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_3d6c6e23/generator.py#L103). The rule is: each occupied input column is erased and rebuilt as a bottom-centered triangle with row widths `1, 3, 5, ...`, and colors occupy consecutive layers in the same top-to-bottom order they first appear in that column. The generator matches the family by sampling 1-2 sparse occupied columns, choosing contiguous color layer partitions, and scattering the corresponding singleton cells above a reserved bottom zone.

The summary hint was used, not discarded; it matched the official examples, so no [notes.md] was needed and no new DSL primitive was added. Verification passed on `4/4` official examples and `1000/1000` generated examples. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/3d6c6e23/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/3d6c6e23/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/3d6c6e23/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/3d6c6e23/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/3d6c6e23/previews/preview_03.png).
